user.title: Samsung TV Max
user.description: Enter the TV's IPv4 address (e.g. 192.168.1.50). Hostnames are not supported. If the TV is off, submit anyway — model, MAC, and pairing complete when it powers on and responds on ports 8001/8002.

pair.title: Pair with TV
pair.description:
Connecting to {host}.

If a pairing request appears on your TV, select **Allow** and click **Submit**.

error.invalid_host: Enter a valid IPv4 address (four numbers, e.g. 192.168.1.50). Hostnames are not allowed for this integration.
error.missing_mac: The TV did not report a usable MAC in the API response. Ensure expert network info is available on the TV, or rely on runtime discovery after power-on.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the TV on port 8001. Check the IPv4 address and that the device is a Samsung TV on your network.
error.unsupported_model: This TV model is not supported. Only Samsung Tizen (2016+) TVs are compatible.
error.unauthorized: The TV rejected the connection. Please allow the remote access request on the TV screen, then click Submit.
